channel.title: Intelligent iT Blog
channel.description: The AI-Native MSP — actionable insights on cybersecurity, compliance, AI operations, and IT strategy.

item.title: Reddit Just Became the Most Important Marketing Channel You're Not Using
item.description: Reddit signed training-data deals with Google and OpenAI in 2024. AI engines now cite Reddit threads as authoritative.
item.dc:creator: Thomas Atkins

item.title: BMS Ransomware Just Hit a Major US School District. Here's the Playbook.
item.description: Building Management System ransomware is operational. Most BMS controllers run firmware older than the laptop you're reading this on.
item.dc:creator: Eero Nevaluoto

item.title: NIST AI RMF Is Your Affirmative Defense Against TRAIGA's $200K Penalties
item.description: TRAIGA enforceable since 1 January 2026. NIST AI RMF substantial compliance is the named affirmative defense.
item.dc:creator: Manuel Ruiz

item.title: Reddit Just Became the Most Important Marketing Channel You're Not Using
item.description: Reddit signed training-data deals with Google and OpenAI in 2024. AI engines now cite Reddit threads as authoritative.
item.dc:creator: Thomas Atkins

item.title: BMS Ransomware Just Hit a Major US School District. Here's the Playbook.
item.description: Building Management System ransomware is operational. Most BMS controllers run firmware older than the laptop you're reading this on.
item.dc:creator: Eero Nevaluoto

item.title: NIST AI RMF Is Your Affirmative Defense Against TRAIGA's $200K Penalties
item.description: TRAIGA enforceable since 1 January 2026. NIST AI RMF substantial compliance is the named affirmative defense.
item.dc:creator: Manuel Ruiz

item.title: Your Brand Is Already Being Quoted by ChatGPT. You Just Don't Know What It's Saying.
item.description: Gartner: 25% of search queries shift to AI engines by end of 2026. Forrester: 73% of B2B buyers consult AI before sales. Generative Engine Optimization is the new top of funnel — and most agencies still optimize for Google's 2018 algorithm.
item.dc:creator: end of

item.title: What Is Zero Trust Security and Why Your Business Needs It in 2026
item.description: Learn what Zero Trust security is, why traditional perimeter security is obsolete, and how mid-sized businesses can implement a Zero Trust framework in 2026.
item.dc:creator: Eero Nevaluoto

item.title: Voice Deepfake Fraud Hit $2.19B in 2025. What an MSP Should Be Doing About It Now.
item.description: Voice deepfake fraud incidents grew 680% YoY in 2025. Cumulative US losses crossed $2.19B. More than 50% of CISOs report a successful deepfake intrusion. Here's the MSP response Intelligent iT is shipping right now.
item.dc:creator: Manuel Ruiz

item.title: SOC 2 Compliance: A Plain-English Guide for Growing Businesses
item.description: Everything mid-sized businesses need to know about SOC 2 compliance: the 5 trust service criteria, Type I vs Type II, timeline, costs, and how to get started.
item.dc:creator: Eero Nevaluoto

item.title: 7 Steps to Protect Your Business from Ransomware in 2026
item.description: Ransomware attacks are more sophisticated than ever. Learn the 7 essential steps mid-sized businesses must take to prevent ransomware attacks in 2026.
item.dc:creator: Eero Nevaluoto

item.title: Machine Identities Outnumber Humans 45-to-1. Most MSPs Don't Govern Any of Them.
item.description: Cloud Security Alliance: machine identities outnumber humans 45:1 average, 80:1 in cloud-native shops. 78% of orgs have no formal AI-identity policy. Non-Human Identity is the new perimeter — and the market for governance just exploded.
item.dc:creator: Eero Nevaluoto

item.title: MSP vs. Internal IT Team: Which Is Right for Your Business?
item.description: A detailed comparison of managed service providers vs. internal IT teams for mid-sized businesses. Covers cost, scalability, expertise, 24/7 coverage, and the co-managed option.
item.dc:creator: Manuel Ruiz

item.title: HIPAA Compliance for IT: The Complete 2026 Checklist
item.description: The complete 2026 HIPAA compliance checklist for IT teams. Covers administrative, physical, and technical safeguards, risk assessments, BAAs, and breach notification requirements.
item.dc:creator: Eero Nevaluoto

item.title: 78% of Companies Don't Govern Their AI Agents. The 30+ MCP CVEs Make That a Ticking Bomb.
item.description: Multi-agent LLM systems fail in production at 41-86% rates per the MAST taxonomy. The MCP transport that wires them has 30+ public CVEs. 78% of organizations don't have any AI-agent governance policy. Here's the gap an MSP can close.
item.dc:creator: Eero Nevaluoto

item.title: EU AI Act Article 50 Goes Live August 2 2026. If You Render Avatar or Voice AI, You're Already Behind.
item.description: EU AI Act Article 50 transparency obligations are fully applicable 2 August 2026. The Code of Practice landed in late 2025. Watermarking, provenance ledgers, consent retention — what every MSP serving regulated buyers needs in production by Q3 2026.
item.dc:creator: Manuel Ruiz

item.title: Vanta Doesn't Run Across Your Client Portfolio. Continuous Audit-as-a-Service Does.
item.description: Vanta, Drata, Comp AI, and Delve are excellent direct-to-startup. They aren't designed for an MSP managing client portfolios with multi-tenant evidence segregation. Here's the gap and what we're shipping.
item.dc:creator: Manuel Ruiz

item.title: How AI Is Transforming IT Operations for Mid-Sized Companies
item.description: Discover how AI-driven predictive monitoring, automated remediation, and intelligent ticketing are revolutionizing IT operations and delivering measurable ROI for mid-sized businesses.
item.dc:creator: Manuel Ruiz

item.title: The True Cost of IT Downtime: What Every CEO Should Know
item.description: IT downtime costs mid-sized businesses far more than they realize. Learn the hidden costs of downtime, how to calculate your risk, and proven prevention strategies.
item.dc:creator: Tyler Whittall

item.title: 5 Cloud Migration Mistakes That Cost Mid-Sized Businesses Thousands
item.description: Avoid the most expensive cloud migration mistakes. Learn the 5 critical errors mid-sized businesses make when moving to the cloud and how to prevent them.
item.dc:creator: Anthony Senior
